subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One to him who hath turned with his heart unto the Most Exalted Horizon and set his face toward God, the Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی من اقبل بقلبه الی الافق الاعلی و توجه الی الله فاطر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
